regions.text: They are in a store. It is a clothing store. She has two dresses in her hands.
These are shoes (women's shoes) and stockings and gloves.
The girl is putting her hand up to the apple. It is on a branch of an apple tree.
She will put it in her basket. Before she took the apple it was on the tree.
Bread, butter, milk, cheese, meat, eggs, and fruit are different sorts of food.
Cows, pigs, sheep, goats, and horses are different sorts of animals.
Apples and oranges are different sorts of fruit.
Men, women, boys, girls, and babies are different sorts of persons.
